name: 迈克·赛弗斯 | 联邦调查局（FBI）狙击手
nameZh: 迈克·赛弗斯 | 联邦调查局（FBI）狙击手
descriptionEn: An ex-Division I athlete, Syfers was recruited by the FBI after a catastrophic knee injury ended his sports career early. Yet even in adversity he remained positive. It's rare to find someone whose desire to succeed is matched by their desire to do good, but Syfers checks both boxes. Naturally, I finished my reps.
descriptionZh: 作为前国家一级运动员，Syfers在他膝盖受伤并结束运动生涯后，曾受雇于联邦调查局。然而即便在逆境中，他仍旧保持乐观的态度。 通常，人们对于总是渴望通过做善事收获成功，而Syfers却渴望黑白两道通吃。 很显然，这就是无间道。
